hyperedges.label: ERP admin section pages sharing AdminLayout shell and Prisma-backed dashboard data
Monorepo build/deploy configuration chain (workspace, turbo pipeline, CI, Railway deploy)
Substance-harm warning images used as article content (alcohol and nicotine)
Media upload pipeline (client convert -> API upload -> storage -> DB -> proxy read)
Auth session lifecycle across login, guarded actions, and logout
Article authoring UI composed of form, rich text editor, and media picker
Message inbox lifecycle (status update / delete / schema)
Media upload pipeline (client WebP conversion -> upload API -> S3 storage -> Media table)
Shared monorepo config consumed by web/erp/db packages
Next.js dynamic route pages with generateMetadata pattern
Форум -> клуб ребрендинг: редиректы и новые маршруты
Shared UI button component (cva variants + cn merge) consumed across pages
Detail-page navigation pattern (slug lookup + prev/next + generateStaticParams)
Tashkent-timezone daily content rotation (verse of day, saints of day, feast-of-day highlight)
AppShell sidebar navigation aggregating primary nav, rubrics, and useful links
